title: Spec: LR-FHSS mode negotiation
description:
Define LR-FHSS mode advertisement and negotiation in spec.

## Location
Add to spec/02-physical-link.md

## Content

### Mode advertisement
- DIO option: LR_FHSS_SUPPORTED flag
- Announce option: LR_FHSS_CAPABLE flag (node can TX/RX LR-FHSS)

### Negotiation
- Gateway sets LR_FHSS_SUPPORTED in DIO
- Capable nodes MAY switch to LR-FHSS for uplink
- Gateway MUST support dual-mode RX (standard + LR-FHSS)
- Downlink: gateway uses same mode as node's last uplink

### Parameters
- Data rate: DR8-DR11 (LR-FHSS modes per LoRaWAN regional params)
- Hopping: OCW (operating channel width) 137kHz or 336kHz
- Coding rate: 1/3 or 2/3

### Backward compatibility
- SX1276 nodes ignore LR_FHSS flags, continue standard LoRa
- Mixed networks work: gateway bridges both modes
notes: HUMAN: How should LR-FHSS negotiation, dual-RX on gateway, SX127x backward compatibility, and scale validation/risk mitigation for 500+ node meshes be handled? Human judgment required on design/compat/risk before any impl.
